final_prompt.prompt:
Design a logo for a music school named "Studio Gitare Požarevac".

风格/媒介: minimal flat vector logo design, modern and professional, music-focused branding
构图:
  stylized guitar element integrated creatively with typography
  works well in both horizontal and centered layout
  clean background, high contrast
主体: logo for "Studio Gitare Požarevac" guitar school
场景/背景: clean / transparent background
光线/氛围: premium, trustworthy, creative feel suitable for a guitar studio or music education brand
色彩方案: elegant palette — black, white, dark blue, or warm wood tones; no bright or neon colors
材质/纹理:
文字(原样): Studio Gitare Požarevac
约束:
  typography clear, slightly artistic but highly readable
  subtle musical elements (strings, sound waves, or notes) only if they fit naturally
  subtle local identity touch inspired by Požarevac, kept minimal and not cliché
  scalable vector style, suitable for print and social media
避免: overly complex design, bright or neon colors, cliché musical clip-art
